title.en: Ye Tian waited quietly in his residence, and di...

content.en:
"Didn't do it!"

Ye Tian waited quietly in his residence, and did not encounter an attack.

Obviously, the Remnant Heaven Pavilion still gave up on attacking himself.

"It's okay, so that we can continue to trade with the Remnant Heaven Pavilion in the future!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After having enough Hailou Gold, Ye Tian began to fuse these Hailou Gold into Hailou Tianjin.

It didn't take long for all of these Hailou gold to become Hailou Tianjin.

"So much Hailou Heavenly Gold is enough for me to condense all the immeasurable bones and refine them to the limit!" Ye Tian affirmed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to cultivate and condense immeasurable bones.

However, the copy body of the Xuan Ming Great Ancestor is not a real copy body after all, so there is no need to refine the immeasurable bone to the limit, just condense the immeasurable bone.

After all, he would abandon the replica body of the Xuanming Great Ancestor at any time in the future, so there was no need to invest too many resources in the early stage, otherwise the gains would outweigh the losses.

......

Before you know it, tens of millions of years of the Primordial Era have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already condensed three hundred and ten immeasurable bones, and he had refined each immeasurable bone to the limit, and he could no longer continue to refine them.

So many immeasurable bones have been tempered to the limit, and now they have finally shown extraordinary power.

"I won't talk about anything else now, the strength of the physical body alone is far beyond that of the same high-level immeasurable lifeforms!" Ye Tian said confidently.

With his current combat strength, he could easily defeat or even crush a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform of the Void Whale Overlord.

"I might be able to compare to a high-level immeasurable lifeform that has condensed hundreds or even thousands of drops of immeasurable blood now!" Ye Tian inferred.

However, the span of the third stage is too large, and the strength of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms that have condensed about 100,000 immeasurable blood far exceeds the high-level immeasurable lifeforms that have just condensed immeasurable blood.

Therefore, there was still a big gap between him and those top-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Infinite Blood Stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Originally, Ye Tian planned to continue cultivating until he condensed all his immeasurable bones.

And yet this day.

A piece of news spread in the Hurricane Territory, shocking countless Great Ancestors.

......

"I didn't expect to hear the news of the Blood Ancestor in the Hurricane Collar!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

According to the news spread, not long ago, that is, not far from the Hurricane Territory, a treasure land, the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, the Blood Ancestor appeared there, and also slaughtered a large number of living beings, as well as some Great Ancestors.

Moreover, the Blood Ancestor also opened a ruin and broke in.

At the moment, the news has spread.

Many forces wanted to kill the Blood Ancestor, after all, there were more than a dozen third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms among the fallen Great Ancestors this time, and there were more than a hundred other high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

You know, even the Hurricane Pavilion is far from having so many high-level immeasurable lifeforms!

Although the Hurricane Collar is not too strong, it is not weak either, so you can imagine how big the losses of the major forces are this time.

Moreover, every time the major forces cultivated a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, they had to pay countless resources and costs, and the loss of one of them was a huge loss.

In the third stage, almost all of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms were the high-level or even leaders of the major forces, and as a result, they fell in the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, and they were still killed by the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

This makes the major forces naturally crazy!

"It seems that the Raccoon Blood Ancestor's injuries have recovered, and he can even kill so many high-level immeasurable lifeforms, even the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms have been killed!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

Obviously, no matter how fast his strength improves, he can't compare to the recovery speed of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, and he will definitely not be able to beat the Raccoon Blood Ancestor now.

"It seems that the peak of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor should be at the top level of the third stage, maybe it is very close to the fourth stage!" Ye Tian guessed.

He didn't care about what happened to the Blood Ancestor, but was curious about the ruins that the Blood Ancestor had broken into.

You must know that in the Xuanqi Territory, there are almost no ruins, and the place that can be called a ruin is definitely not an ordinary place, otherwise it will be called a ruin by high-level immeasurable lifeforms!

"Let's take a look!"

Ye Tian went to the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss as the Great Ancestor of the Xuan Ming to see if he could get some benefits this time.

......

Nine Dark Blood Abyss.

Many forces have sent high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and these forces are huge forces that span one territory after another, but they are not forces like the Hurricane Pavilion that are limited to the Hurricane Territory.

At this time, these forces are all here for the relics, and if they have the opportunity, they naturally want to kill the Blood Ancestor by the way.

For this reason, several top-notch third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms have come here, and their target is the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

Not long after, Ye Tian also arrived here.

"The Nine Shadows Blood Abyss has arrived!"

Ye Tian entered here and sensed the prying eyes of some Great Ancestors, but these Great Ancestors just probed at random, and had no purpose.

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, he only knew that the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss would occasionally give birth to some treasure resources that were helpful to immeasurable blood, and several big forces had joined forces to control most of the territory, and other Great Ancestors were not allowed to interfere.

But because of the attack of the Blood Ancestor, those forces directly declined, and naturally there was no way to control the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss.

The Nine Shadows Blood Abyss is also dangerous, but the general danger is not great, as long as you are careful, high-level immeasurable lifeforms will hardly fall here.

However, the core area of the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss is very dangerous, and high-level immeasurable lifeforms are easy to fall, and that ruin is in the core area of the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, which is an area that ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms cannot set foot in.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian quickly stepped into the core area of the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, passing through a layer of blood-colored mist area, among which there were some extremely subtle creatures hidden, but the strength of each creature was not weak, and the number was almost endless, and the life-saving ability was also terrifying.

If you are not careful, even the high-level immeasurable lifeforms at the peak of the second stage may be eaten by flesh and blood and fall here.

"Die!"

Ye Tian's body exploded with power, shattering countless creatures hidden inside the blood-colored mist—the Blood Shadow Worm!

These Blood Shadow Worms could not threaten him at all, and in a short time he passed through this area of blood-colored mist, and then through other dangerous areas, and finally came to the entrance of the ruins.

At this time, some high-level immeasurable lifeforms had gathered here, but none of them dared to enter.

"This is the ruins!"

Ye Tian looked at an entrance in front of him and muttered.
